They have the last stretch of the road blocked for residents only, so we parked and hiked the rest of the way in. The winding roads are crazy, but the view is the payoff. I really enjoyed this side trek.
I passed by this spot when hiking along the Innsdale Trail up to the Hollywood Sign. This spot offers a great view of the iconic sign as is about the closest vantage point for a photo.
Don’t bother, drive all the way up the windy road, no where to stop at all and actual road up to the sign was closed. Must drive the residents mad
